incident: Duplicate hook files with hyphen/underscore spellings coexist in .claude/hooks/
root_cause: Files were copied/renamed without removing the old spelling: auto-apply.py vs auto_apply.py, internet-scanner.py vs internet_scanner.py, openoutreach-monitor.py vs openoutreach_monitor.py, trend-scanner.py vs trend_scanner.py
fix: LOGGED ONLY — not deleted this session. cron and imports may reference either spelling; deletion is a separate approved task.
lesson: Before deleting any duplicate, grep crontab AND all .py imports for BOTH spellings. Underscore versions are likely the importable module names (kamil_log etc. use underscores).

incident: Kamil had no PreToolUse hooks — nothing mechanically blocked dangerous commands or oversized CLAUDE.md
root_cause: settings.json only wired SessionStart/UserPromptSubmit/PostToolUse/Stop; the feedback/enforcement half of the harness was missing
fix: Added block-bad-commands.py and guard-file-writes.py in Phase 3 of this plan
lesson: Guides without sensors = a style guide nobody enforces. Enforcement must be mechanical (exit 2), not a CLAUDE.md request.

incident: Self-healing loop became a noise/damage source: listener falsely reported down→restarted every 10min; content-scheduler 're-fixed' 13+ times for an already-fixed syntax error; observer auto-fix added destructive nlm-delete calls based on hallucinated root causes; duplicate contradictory DMs (could-not-auto-fix + Status:fixed)
root_cause: (1) is_process_running uses bare pgrep -f, false-negative/self-match flapping. (2) Observer queries last-hour Axiom errors with NO idempotency/already-fixed memory, so stale errors get re-diagnosed and re-fixed forever. (3) Auto-fix shells claude -p with no diff review, no test, no confirm-error-is-real → confident wrong edits committed to master. (4) self-healer and observer both DM independently for the same incident.
fix: Pending architectural redesign: dedup/cooldown on incidents, verify-error-is-current before fixing, require failing-test-then-fix, pause auto-fix by default, single DM owner.
lesson: A feedback/healing system needs idempotency and verification MORE than a feature does. Never let an auto-fixer edit+commit on an unverified, possibly-stale diagnosis. Detection must not self-match (pgrep -f matches the checker's own cmdline).
